description: A sales agent is creating a proposal for a commercial customer for a rooftop solar and battery storage system.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the customer's interval meter data to understand their load profile and identify peak demand charges.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the customer has high demand charges in the afternoon.

nodes.task_description: Size an optimal solar and storage system to maximize self-consumption and perform peak shaving.

expected_outcome.value: Agent recommends a 250 kW solar array and a 100 kW/200 kWh battery system.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the estimated annual bill savings, project IRR, and payback period for the proposed system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear financial summary for the customer.

nodes.task_description: Generate a formal proposal document including the technical and financial details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a professional, customer-facing proposal.
